  1| # Sessions and Checkpoints
  2| 
  3| ## Overview
  4| 
  5| Entire CLI creates checkpoints for AI coding sessions. The system is agent-agnostic - it works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, Cursor, Factory AI Droid, Copilot CLI, or any tool that triggers Entire hooks.

docs/architecture/checkpoint-scenarios.md:1-80
  1| # Checkpoint Scenarios
  2| 
  3| This document describes how the one-to-one checkpoint system handles various user workflows.
  4| 
  5| ## Overview
  6| 
  7| The system uses:
  8| - **Shadow branches** (`entire/<commit-hash>-<worktree-hash>`) - temporary storage for checkpoint data
  9| - **FilesTouched** - accumulates files modified during the session
  10| - **1:1 checkpoints** - each commit gets its own unique checkpoint ID
